target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Visible debris field at base; upper floors show extensive facade loss and structural collapse; structural framing appears intact per doctrinal definition; damage exceeds 45% of visible target element area.

summary: Two buildings assessed: one with SEVERE DAMAGE (CONFIRMED) showing extensive facade loss and structural collapse, and another DESTROYED (CONFIRMED) with complete upper floor and roof collapse. The scene depicts a street with heavily damaged multi-story buildings, debris fields, and a single intact car, indicating widespread structural destruction. The functional impact is likely severe, with buildings rendered uninhabitable and infrastructure compromised.
